secrets.name: VALIDATOR_PRIVATE_KEY
secrets.description: ECDSA private key for the validator wallet that signs claimWin messages. Staging default is Hardhat account #0.

secrets.name: UTGO_CONTRACT_ADDRESS
secrets.description: Deployed WagerEscrow contract address on Usernode EVM chain. Staging uses a placeholder (no real contract).

secrets.name: TREASURY_WALLET
secrets.description: EVM address receiving the 8% treasury cut of each wager pot.

secrets.name: REDIS_URL
secrets.description: Redis connection URL for PvP matchmaking queue and match timers.
